Verified by reading setup_task.sh and export_result.sh scripts which create and read from this path.

Calculated total portfolio value ($52,627.50) from setup_task.sh. Equal weight is $17,542.50 per stock. AAPL (185.20) target is ~94.7 shares (sell 5). MSFT (374.50) target is ~46.8 shares (sell 3). NVDA (615.30) target is ~28.5 shares (buy 3.5). The verifier strictly enforces 4-6 for AAPL, 2-4 for MSFT, and 2-4 for NVDA.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on synthetically generated JStock portfolio data seeded via setup scripts. The target equal-weight allocation requires each position to be around $17,542.50. Based on initial prices, this corresponds to selling ~5 shares of AAPL and ~3 shares of MSFT, while buying ~3 shares of NVDA. The verifier.py correctly enforces these targets with a tolerance of ±1 share via reading the specific buyportfolio.csv and sellportfolio.csv file paths.
